value.rationale: The fetched page (Config basics – Codex) covers configuration options such as model selection, approval policies, sandbox modes, permission profiles, web search, reasoning effort, feature flags, and more. There is no mention anywhere on the page of a "dev container" integration or running the agent inside a defined dev container or isolated runtime in the dev-container sense. The sandbox_mode options described are Codex-specific sandbox levels, not dev containers (e.g., Docker/VS Code devcontainer spec). The claim is not substantiated by this page.
